step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("evidence that dedicated discharge coordinators reduce hospital readmissions")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Final answer must contain only two clinical-focused sentences and end with exactly one boxed letter.
A dedicated discharge coordinator improves hospital discharge quality by systematically reducing 30-day and 90-day readmission rates through enhanced patient education, follow-up scheduling, and medication reconciliation—all demonstrated in rigorous studies like the Care Transition Intervention (CTI). These improvements are consistently tied to lower costs, better patient safety, and optimized resource utilization across diverse healthcare settings.
